name: Gujerati-Style Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the beans and cut them into 1-inch lengths.
2. Blanch the beans by dropping them into a pot of boiling water and boiling rapidly for 3-4 minutes, or until they are just tender. Drain immediately in a colander and rinse under cold, running water. Set aside.
3. Heat the oil in a large frying pan over medium flame. When hot, add the mustard seeds. As soon as the mustard seeds begin to pop, add the garlic. Stir the garlic pieces around until they turn light brown.
4. Add the crushed red chili and stir for a few seconds. Add the green beans, salt, and sugar. Stir to mix.
5. Lower the heat to medium-low. Stir and cook the beans for 7-8 minutes, or until they have absorbed the flavor of the spices. Add the black pepper, mix, and serve.
Note: The green beans can be prepared ahead of time, then finished 15 minutes before serving.
